Bash(/tmp/gifenv/bin/python3 - << 'EOF'
from PIL import Image
import os

src = "/Users/jamiedavies/Downloads/Sign up _ create account \(1\)/"
out = "/Users/jamiedavies/Downloads/personalsite/public/images/kiosk-code-flow.gif"
files = sorted\([src + f for f in os.listdir\(src\) if f.endswith\('.png'\) or f.endswith\('.jpg'\)]\)

target_w = 900
frames = []
for f in files:
    im = Image.open\(f\).convert\("RGB"\)
    ratio = target_w / im.width
    im = im.resize\(\(target_w, int\(im.height * ratio\)\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    frames.append\(im\)

min_h = min\(f.height for f in frames\)
frames = [f.crop\(\(0, 0, target_w, min_h\)\) for f in frames]

frames[0].save\(
    out,
    save_all=True,
    append_images=frames[1:],
    duration=1000,
    loop=0,
    optimize=False,
\)
print\(f"Saved {out}  \({len\(frames\)} frames, {os.path.getsize\(out\) // 1024}kb\)"\)
EOF)
